title: Project Silence
tmdbOverview: Due to sudden deteriorating weather conditions, visibility on the Airport Bridge is severely impaired, leaving people stranded and at risk of the bridge collapsing due to a series of chain collisions and explosions. Amidst the chaos, the canine subjects "Echo" from the military experiment "Project Silence," who were being transported in secret, break free, and all human survivors become targets of relentless attacks.
synopsis: Released in 2024, Project Silence is a thriller, action and horror film from South Korea. It has a 5.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (ES rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
